exercises.name: Yoga - Reverse Warrior (Viparita Virabhadrasana)
exercises.description: From Warrior II, flip your front palm, lean back, and stretch your arm up and over, creating a deep side stretch.

exercises.name: Yoga - Revolved Chair Pose (Parivrtta Utkatasana)
exercises.description: From Chair Pose, twist your torso toward the front leg and place your opposite elbow on the outside of the bent knee, keeping your chest lifted.

exercises.name: Yoga - Revolved Head-to-Knee Pose (Parivrtta Janu Sirsasana)
exercises.description: Sit with one leg extended, bend the other knee, and twist your torso toward the bent leg, extending the arm toward the foot of the straight leg.

exercises.name: Yoga - Revolved Side Angle Pose (Parivrtta Parsvakonasana)
exercises.description: From Side Angle Pose, twist your torso toward the front leg, placing the opposite hand on the floor while keeping the back leg straight.

exercises.name: Yoga - Revolved Triangle Pose (Parivrtta Trikonasana)
exercises.description: From Triangle Pose, twist your torso toward the front leg, placing your opposite hand on the floor or a block, while keeping both legs straight.

exercises.name: Yoga - Seated Forward Bend (Paschimottanasana)
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended straight in front of you, reach for your feet, and fold forward, lengthening the spine while keeping the chest open.

exercises.name: Yoga - Seated Side Stretch
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended, reach one arm overhead, and lean to the opposite side, stretching the side of the body.

exercises.name: Yoga - Seated Spinal Twist
exercises.description: Sit with legs crossed. Rotate your torso to one side, using your opposite hand on your knee for support.

exercises.name: Yoga - Shoulder Stand (Sarvangasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift your legs overhead, and support your lower back with your hands while extending your legs toward the ceiling.

exercises.name: Yoga - Side Crow Pose (Parsva Bakasana)
exercises.description: From a squat, twist your torso to one side, placing the opposite arm across the thighs, and balance on the hands while keeping the legs lifted.

exercises.name: Yoga - Sphinx Pose
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach and prop yourself up on your forearms, lifting your chest for a gentle backbend.

exercises.name: Yoga - Staff Pose (Dandasana)
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended straight in front of you, feet flexed, and hands placed beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.

exercises.name: Yoga - Standing Forward Fold (Uttanasana)
exercises.description: From standing, hinge at your hips, keeping a slight bend in the knees, and fold forward, reaching for your toes or placing hands on the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Standing Splits (Urdhva Prasarita Eka Padasana)
exercises.description: From a standing position, hinge at your hips, extending one leg straight up toward the sky, and reach your hands to the floor or your supporting leg.

exercises.name: Yoga - Sun Salutation A (Surya Namaskar A)
exercises.description: Start in Mountain Pose, inhale and raise your arms, exhale into Forward Fold, inhale to Half Lift, exhale to Plank, lower to Chaturanga, inhale to Upward Dog, exhale to Downward Dog, and repeat the flow.

exercises.name: Yoga - Sun Salutation B (Surya Namaskar B)
exercises.description: A variation of Sun Salutation A, adding Warrior I and Chair Pose between the standard movements.

exercises.name: Yoga - Supine Twist (Jathara Parivartanasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, bring your knees to your chest, and drop them to one side while keeping your shoulders grounded.

exercises.name: Yoga - Three-Legged Dog to Knee-to-Nose Flow
exercises.description: From Downward Dog, lift one leg to the sky, then bring the knee toward your nose and shift into a plank position.

exercises.name: Yoga - Tree Pose (Vrksasana)
exercises.description: Stand on one leg, place the sole of the other foot on your inner thigh or calf (avoid the knee), and raise your arms overhead with palms together.

exercises.name: Yoga - Triangle Pose (Trikonasana)
exercises.description: Stand with feet wide apart, extend arms, and bend at the waist over one leg, bringing the hand to the floor or a block and the other arm reaching toward the ceiling.

exercises.name: Yoga - Upward-Facing Dog (Urdhva Mukha Svanasana)
exercises.description: Lie face down, press your palms into the floor, and lift your chest and hips, straightening your arms while keeping your legs off the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Warrior I (Virabhadrasana I)
exercises.description: Step one foot back, bend the front knee, and raise both arms overhead. Keep hips square and the back leg straight.

exercises.name: Yoga - Warrior II (Virabhadrasana II)
exercises.description: From Warrior I, open your hips and shoulders, extending arms parallel to the floor and palms facing down.

exercises.name: Yoga - Warrior II to Reverse Warrior Flow
exercises.description: From Warrior II, transition into Reverse Warrior by flipping your front palm, reaching your arm back, and keeping the hips open.

exercises.name: Yoga - Warrior III (Virabhadrasana III)
exercises.description: From standing, shift weight onto one leg, extend the other leg back, and reach arms forward, creating a straight line from fingertips to toes.

exercises.name: Yoga - Wheel Pose (Chakrasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, place your hands and feet on the floor, and press up, creating an arch with your body while engaging your arms and legs.

exercises.name: Yoga - Wide-Angle Seated Forward Bend (Upavistha Konasana)
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended wide apart, hinge at the hips, and fold forward, keeping your spine long and engaging your inner thighs.

exercises.name: Yoga - Wide-Legged Forward Fold (Prasarita Padottanasana)
exercises.description: Stand with legs wide apart, hinge at your hips, and fold forward, bringing your head toward the ground and hands under your shoulders.

exercises.name: Yoga - Wild Thing (Camatkarasana)
exercises.description: From Downward Dog, flip onto the outer edge of one foot, and lift the other leg and arm toward the sky, arching your back.

exercises.name: Zottman Curl
exercises.alternateName: Dumbbell Zottman curl bicep curl and twist
exercises.description:
1) Stand and hold two dumbbells with arms hanging down on both sides. 

2) Curl both dumbbells up towards your shoulders and when you reach the top, rotate your wrists so that your palms face downwards. 

3) Lower the weights to the starting position as your palms face downwards.
 
4) Repeat.
